---
id: delete-all-friends
title: "DeleteAllFriends"
description: "调用此接口，可为用户单向或双向删除全部好友数据。"
api: 
info_path: core_products/zim/zh/docs_zim_server_zh/user/open-api-desc
date: "2026-07-08"
---

<h1 className={"openapi__heading"}>DeleteAllFriends</h1>

<MethodEndpoint method={"get"} path={"/"}></MethodEndpoint>


调用此接口，可为用户单向或双向删除全部好友数据。

以用户 A、B 举例说明单向删除和双向删除：
- 单向删除：当用户 A 单向删除了用户 B，用户 B 不再是用户 A 的好友、用户 A 仍为用户 B 的好友。
- 双向删除：当用户 A 双向删除了用户 B，彼此都不再是对方的好友。

为用户删除好友成功后，相关用户的客户端将通过以下 ZIM SDK 的回调接口接收好友列表更新的通知：

| iOS-25% | Android-25% | macOS-25% | Windows-25% |
|-----|---------|--------|---------|
| [friendListChanged](/zim-ios/client-sdks/api-reference/protocol#zimfriendlistchangedaction-zimeventhandler) | [onFriendListChanged](/zim-android/client-sdks/api-reference/class#onfriendlistchanged-zimeventhandler) | [friendListChanged](/zim-macos/client-sdks/api-reference/protocol#zimfriendlistchangedaction-zimeventhandler) | [onFriendListChanged](/zim-win/client-sdks/api-reference/class#onfriendlistchanged-zimeventhandler) |

| Web-25% | 小程序-25% | Flutter-25% | React Native-25% |
|-----|---------|---------|---------|
| [onFriendListChanged](/zim-web/client-sdks/api-reference/class#onfriendlistchanged-zimeventhandler) | [onFriendListChanged](/zim-miniprogram/client-sdks/api-reference/class#onfriendlistchanged-zimeventhandler) | [onFriendListChanged](/zim-flutter/client-sdks/api-reference/class#onfriendlistchanged-zimeventhandler) | [friendListChanged](/zim-uniapp-x/client-sdks/api-reference/interface#friendlistchanged-zimeventhandler) |

| uni-app \| uni-app x-25% | HarmonyOS-25% |
|---------|---------|
| [friendListChanged](/zim-uniapp-x/client-sdks/api-reference/interface#friendlistchanged-zimeventhandler) | [friendListChanged](/zim-harmonyos/client-sdks/api-reference/interface#friendlistchanged-zimeventhandler) |

<Note title="说明">参数 FromUserId 仅支持数字，英文字符和 `'!', '#', '$', '%', '&', '(', ')', '+', '-', ':', ';', '<', '=', '.', '>', '?', '@', '[', ']', '^', '_', '{', '}', '|', '~'`。</Note>

<Note title="说明">调用频率限制：20 次/秒。</Note>

## Request
<details style={{"marginBottom":"1rem"}} className={"openapi-markdown__details"} data-collapsed={false} open={true}><summary style={{}}><h3 className={"openapi-markdown__details-summary-header-params"}>Query Parameters</h3></summary><div><ul><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"Action","in":"query","required":true,"description":"> 接口原型参数\n>\n> https://zim-api.zego.im/?Action=DeleteAllFriends\n","schema":{"type":"string","enum":["DeleteAllFriends"]},"style":"form","explode":true}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"AppId","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。应用 Id，由 ZEGO 分配的用户唯一凭证。可从 <a target=\"_blank\" href=\"https://console.zego.im/\">ZEGO 控制台</a> 获取。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"uint32"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"SignatureNonce","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。16 位 16 进制随机字符串（8 字节随机数的 hex 编码）。生成算法可参考 <a href=\"/zim-server/accessing-server-apis#signature-example\">签名示例</a>。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"Timestamp","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。当前 Unix 时间戳，单位为秒。生成算法可参考 <a href=\"/zim-server/accessing-server-apis#signature-example\">签名示例</a>，最多允许 10 分钟的误差。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"int64"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"SignatureVersion","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。签名版本号。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","default":"2.0","enum":["2.0"]}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"Signature","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。签名，用于验证请求的合法性。请参考[签名机制](/zim-server/accessing-server-apis#signature-mechanism)生成。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"FromUserId","in":"query","required":true,"description":"为此 UserId（已在客户端调用 login 方法登录 ZIM 服务，或已调用 [服务端 API](/zim-server/user/batch-register-users) 完成注册）删除全部好友。","schema":{"type":"string","maxLength":32,"example":"zego_user"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"DeleteType","in":"query","required":true,"description":"删除类型：\n- 0：双向删除。\n- 1：单向删除。\n","schema":{"type":"number","enum":[0,1],"example":1}}}></ParamsItem></ul></div></details>
